updates.tweet_text:
Today, like most summer days, is very easy trading in #ES_F: Ride runner, and get paid. I posted hours ago that the range was 7540-7567. I then  posted to hold runner and prepare for breakout. I gave 3 breakout targets: 7578, 7588 (hit), then 7597.

Then, we see 7611 bonus https://t.co/DPzHTWPlPn
updates.notes: All prices are hindsight references to prior posts or observations of price action already hit (7578 is morning plan). 7588/7597/7611 are prior breakout targets or observed prints, not newly named actionable levels.

updates.tweet_text: Note: And as always, this plan was given out on Thursday before the close in the newsletter, for Friday and today's session https://t.co/Or5HmeSwrZ
updates.notes: Tweet is a promotional/informational note referencing the newsletter with no actionable price levels named.

updates.tweet_text: @DrJonnyBros All resistances just become supports once cleared
updates.notes: General conceptual reply about S/R flip mechanics; no specific price named or actionable level introduced.

updates.tweet_text: @D5star_general Id do the 7540 failed breakdown for sure. I probably wouldnt rebuy the 10% though but its a personal preference. 10% doesnt make a big difference either way and mostly just helps with FOMO
updates.notes: 7540 is already in the morning plan. Rest is personal preference commentary, no new actionable levels named.

updates.tweet_text:
We continue to drift up in #ES_F and just nothing to do. 7540-7567 was today's range. I posted earlier the task today was to hold runner for range breakout with 3 targets. They were: 7578 (hit), 7588 (hit), 7597 (2 points shy)

Once 7597 clears, we see 7611 bonus. Same supports https://t.co/nBZmronieS
updates.notes: 7588 and 7597 are new runner targets not in morning plan; 7611 explicitly named as bonus target once 7597 clears — all three are actionable upside levels.

updates.tweet_text: Closing update #ES_F: It took all day but we arriving at 7597 final target. This is peak summer trading and its as easy as it gets as long as you wait for the volatility spikes, then sit in a runner and do nothing. Today's targets were 7578, 7588, 7597. Newsletter out soon
updates.notes: All mentioned prices (7578, 7588, 7597) are either morning plan levels or target observations. No new actionable levels named.

updates.tweet_text:
Low volatility summer trading continues in #ES_F. No good entries since Thursday's late day 7521 Failed Breakdown. Yesterday's targets were 7578, 7588, 7597, all hit

Plan today: 7565=weak support (held), 7540 below (watch traps). 7587, 7597, 7611+ next slate of targets https://t.co/txHRYJDpxh
updates.notes: All prices mentioned (7521, 7578, 7588, 7597, 7565, 7540, 7587, 7611) are either morning-plan levels, hindsight references, or reaffirmations. No new actionable levels introduced.

updates.tweet_text: @RyanMorse33 The levels or entries don't change regardless what time I send it especially on a low volatility day. Doesn't matter if I send it at 1pm, 2pm, 3pm, 5pm. Entries don't change
updates.notes: No prices mentioned at all; tweet is a conversational reply about timing of level publication, not naming any actionable level.

updates.tweet_text: @RyanMorse33 Yesterday for example the key entries were at 65, then the 51/40 failed breakdowns. We did not hit 65 until 1am, so ending it at 3pm rather than 4pm literally makes 0 difference. I could've sent it at 10am and nothing would have changed
updates.notes: Reply to user about trading hours/timing. Mentions 65, 51, 40 only as shorthand historical references with no actionable naming language; no new levels.

updates.tweet_text: @Tiquisito I wouldnt personally, too small and too close to top of structure. 53 is though
updates.notes: Conversational reply to a user; '53' is an informal reference, no explicit price named with actionable naming language, and likely refers to morning-plan level 7253 or similar.

updates.tweet_text:
No increase in volatility yet and this is peak summer trading in #ES_F. Its what runners are for. Traders need volatility. 7521 Failed Breakdown Thursday was last entry. Yesterday's target was 7597 (hit).

7565=support (weak), 7540 below. 7588, 7597, 7611+ are today's targets https://t.co/7HnlMTZA1y
updates.notes: All prices mentioned (7521, 7597, 7565, 7540, 7588, 7597, 7611) are either morning-plan levels or reaffirmations/observations; no new actionable levels introduced.

updates.tweet_text: @NYJets2017 For sure! I always tell people that even though I only long and never short, my strategy performs much  better in downtrends than uptrends. If today were a very red day would've likely already had 3 trades
updates.notes: Conversational reply about strategy/trading style; no price levels named or actionable signals given.

updates.tweet_text:
Tiny volatility pickup in #ES_F finally but need much more still. 7521 Failed Breakdown Thursday was last entry and we got to 7597 target yesterday.

7565 was 1st support today (weak), flushed now. Watch reoveries. 7553, 7540 below (watch traps). 7588, 7598, 7611+ remain targets https://t.co/JfdU08dzLQ
updates.notes: 7553 is the only non-morning-plan price mentioned, but it appears in a directional list ('7553, 7540 below') as an observation, not named with actionable language.

updates.tweet_text: @RedPill51762365 That not what it says at all

updates.tweet_text:
Finally volatility in #ES_F and now we can stalk new entries for the first time since Thursday's 7521 Failed Breakdown. Bulls need to recover 7540 now with momentum and force to see 7553, 7565+

7521, 7511 (watch traps), 7504 are below now https://t.co/M4w4PmKZpH

updates.tweet_text: @tradivate Just needs to meet the non-acceptance protocol requirement in newsletter. If we are pushing through 45 hard and holding above for several minutes, we've usually got momentum. We'll see if we can trigger
updates.notes: No new actionable price level named; '45' is a casual shorthand reference to an existing morning-plan level (7245/7345?), framed as momentum observation, not a new named level.

updates.tweet_text: @artbrokerr Please read the instructions in the newsletter. There has not yet been a Failed Breakdown of 7540 (Sunday low) via any my criteria
updates.notes: Reply to user explaining FBD criteria not met for 7540 (morning plan level). No new actionable level named, just clarification of existing level status.

updates.tweet_text: @artbrokerr We flushed the low down to 30, and are now hovering within the 5 point danger zone which has to clear and hold above for several minutes
updates.notes: Observation of price action near existing morning level (7320 implied by '30'). No new actionable price named with required naming language.

updates.tweet_text: @NYJets2017 @tradivate Yes 38.25 but theres another small low at 40 right next to it. I typically use the higher of the two in that situation when it comes to the non acceptance protocol entry
updates.notes: Reply explaining entry methodology using 38.25/40 as illustrative examples in context, not actionable ES futures levels named as new major levels.

updates.tweet_text:
We got our brief daily volatility lift. 7540 remains key support (this was Sunday's low) and #ES_F likes it here stuck here for 30 minutes now. Bulls must recover this with force and momentum (exact trigger given in newsletter) to see 7553, 7565+

7521, 7511 (watch traps) below https://t.co/l1Cu0tJSuS
